subject: [PATCH v7 1/2] firmware_loader: add search_path= module option for multi-path firmware lookup

2026-04-02.patch_summary: This patch adds a new module option called firmware_class.search_path= that allows users to specify multiple paths where the kernel should search for firmware files. The input is preprocessed at boot or sysfs write time into a NUL-separated sequence of paths, avoiding per-load parsing overhead. The lookup order prioritizes the specified paths over built-in default paths and legacy single-path configurations.
